Privacy.title: Privacy & Analytics
Privacy.description: Manage how your usage data is collected
Privacy.optOutDescription: Stop all usage tracking. Your existing data is retained.
Privacy.whatWeTrack: We track: page views, feature usage (lessons viewed, quizzes taken, flashcards reviewed, tutor messages). All data is pseudonymized with no personal identifiers.
Privacy.whatWeDoNotTrack: We do NOT track: message content, quiz answers, personal data (name, email), session recordings, or cookies.
Privacy.howStored: Data is stored on EU servers (PostHog EU) using localStorage only. No cookies are used. Your IP address is not captured. DNT headers are respected.
Privacy.yourRights: You can opt out at any time using the toggle above. On account deletion, all analytics data linked to your pseudonymized ID is removed.

AdminCourses.confirmDeleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. The course and all its content will be permanently deleted.
AdminCourses.confirmDeleteDescDetailed: This will permanently delete the course, all modules, generated content, enrollments, and all learner progress data. This action cannot be undone.

index.title: RAG Indexation
index.description: The system indexes your resources into the vector database to enable on-demand content generation.
index.resumeHint: You can close and come back later. The task continues in the background.
index.noImagesIndexed: No images were indexed. You can re-index images separately without re-running the full pipeline (no extra OpenAI cost).
index.staleWarning: No progress detected for over 60 seconds. The task may be stuck.
index.cancelSuccess: Indexation cancelled. You can restart it.

closeWhileRunning.title: Indexation still running
closeWhileRunning.description: Indexation is still running in the background. You can close and come back later to resume.

publish.title: Publish course
publish.description: Your course is ready. Publish it to make it available to learners.
publish.successDesc: The course is now visible in the catalog.
publish.error: Failed to publish course. Make sure indexation is complete.
